forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 53. West southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 65, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 5 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
In the stillness of the night, Downtown San Francisco embraces a gentle, partly cloudy backdrop, as the temperature hovers comfortably around 53 degrees. The subtle westerly breeze of about 7 mph whispers through the streets, beckoning early risers to greet the day. By dawn, the sun will reveal itself, casting a warm glow over the cityscape. As Friday unfurls, expect mostly sunny skies, with the afternoon leisurely drifting down to about 62 degrees, a perfect transition for those wandering through the vibrant city.

Though the fog may linger in the corners of the Bay, it shall not overstay its welcome today. The clarity of the horizon hints at a pleasant day ahead, where the essence of spring invigorates the spirit. As you step outside, consider layering garments to adapt to the shifting temperatures. A light jacket or sweater will suffice as the morning chill yields to a more temperate midday warmth. This delightful weather invites you to meander along the waterfront, savoring a tranquil stroll or perhaps indulging in a leisurely brunch at one of the quaint outdoor cafes. Take a moment to sit and watch the world flow by, soaking in the simple beauty that the City by the Bay offers under its expansive sky.
